name: tau-knowledge
description: Apply τ-Knowledge to τ-knowledge problems. Technique: Conversational agents are increasingly deployed in knowledge-intensive settings,...
content:
## Overview

This skill implements the technique from "τ-Knowledge: Evaluating Conversational Agents".

Key contribution: Conversational agents are increasingly deployed in knowledge-intensive settings, where correct behavior depends on retrieving and applying domain-specific knowledge from large, proprietary, and unstructured corpora during live interactions with users. Yet most existing benchmarks evaluate retrieval or tool use independently of each other, creating a gap in realistic, fully agentic evaluation over unstructured data in long-horizon interactions.

## When to use

- Apply when solving τ-knowledge problems
- When baseline approaches are insufficient
- Working with structured problem spaces

## When NOT to use

- If problem constraints limit complexity
- When simpler methods achieve target performance
- Time-critical scenarios with strict latency needs

## Core Technique

The paper proposes an approach through:

1. Problem formulation from the paper
2. Algorithm implementation as described
3. Integration with existing systems
4. Evaluation against baselines

## Implementation

1. Understand problem requirements
2. Implement core algorithm components
3. Configure evaluation metrics from paper
4. Compare against baseline methods
5. Tune hyperparameters for your domain

## References

Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.04370
